CREATE TABLE email_messages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT);

INSERT INTO email_messages (id, content) VALUES (1, 'Subject: Test Email
From: <sender@example.com>
To: <recipient@example.com>
Cc: <copy@example.com>
Bcc: <bcc@example.com>

This is a test email body.');

INSERT INTO email_messages (id, content) VALUES (2, 'Subject: Another Email
From: <no-reply@example.com>
To: <user@example.com>

Here is another email body.');
SELECT * FROM email_messages WHERE content LIKE '%Test Email%';
SELECT * FROM email_messages WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM email_messages WHERE content LIKE '%another%');
CREATE PROCEDURE send_test_email() AS BEGIN CALL smtp_send((SELECT content FROM email_messages WHERE id = 1)); END;
CREATE TABLE email_senders (sender_id INT PRIMARY KEY, sender_email TEXT);
SELECT s.sender_email, m.content FROM email_senders s JOIN email_messages m ON s.sender_id = 1 WHERE m.id = 1;
CREATE VIEW all_email_info AS SELECT s.sender_email, m.content FROM email_senders s, email_messages m;

INSERT INTO email_messages (id, content) VALUES (3, 'Subject: Overly Long Email
From: <long@example.com>
To: <recipient2@example.com>

' || REPEAT('A', 1000));
CALL smtp_send((SELECT content FROM email_messages WHERE id = 3));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_messages WHERE content LIKE '%test%';
SELECT DISTINCT content FROM email_messages WHERE content IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE email_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, email_content TEXT, log_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO email_logs (log_id, email_content, log_time) VALUES (1, (SELECT content FROM email_messages WHERE id = 1), NOW());
CREATE PROCEDURE log_email_send() AS BEGIN INSERT INTO email_logs (email_content, log_time) VALUES ((SELECT content FROM email_messages WHERE id = 1), NOW()); END;
